creator: oliver@akephalos.de
text:
If I add the number (0x00d2) to usbhid there are a lot of phantom  
clicks while moving the mouse around but no movement of the pointer  
itself.

Microsoft Notebook Optical Mouse 3000 (Model 1049)

low speed, power 100mA, config 1
(0x00d2), Microsoft(0x045e), rev 1.20
